channel.title: Mistral News
channel.description: Latest news and announcements from Mistral AI.

item.title: Mistral 7B
item.description: The best 7B model to date, Apache 2.0

item.title: Bringing open AI models to the frontier
item.description: Why we're building Mistral AI.

item.title: Mixtral of experts
item.description: A high quality Sparse Mixture-of-Experts.

item.title: La Plateforme
item.description: Our first AI endpoints are available in early access.

item.title: Au Large
item.description: Mistral Large is our flagship model, with top-tier reasoning capacities. It is also available on Azure.

item.title: Le Chat
item.description: Our assistant is now in beta access, demonstrating what can be built with our technology.

item.title: Cheaper, Better, Faster, Stronger
item.description: Continuing to push the frontier of AI and making it accessible to all.

item.title: The Mistral AI Non-Production License
item.description: Mistral AI introduces the MNPL to promote sustainable openness in AI.

item.title: Codestral
item.description: Empowering developers and democratising coding with Mistral AI.

item.title: Mistral AI Fine-tuning Hackathon
item.description: We are thrilled to announce the Mistral AI fine-tuning hackathon, a virtual experience taking place from June 5 - 30, 2024.

item.title: My Tailor is Mistral
item.description: Fine-tune and deploy your custom Mistral models using Mistral fine-tuning API and SDK.

item.title: MathΣtral
item.description: As a tribute to Archimedes, whose 2311th anniversary we're celebrating this year, we are proud to release our first Mathstral model, a specific 7B model designed for math reasoning and scientific discovery. The model has a 32k context window published under the Apache 2.0 license.

item.title: Codestral Mamba
item.description: As a tribute to Cleopatra, whose glorious destiny ended in tragic snake circumstances, we are proud to release Codestral Mamba, a Mamba2 language model specialised in code generation, available under an Apache 2.0 license.

item.title: Mistral NeMo
item.description: Mistral NeMo: our new best small model. A state-of-the-art 12B model with 128k context length, built in collaboration with NVIDIA, and released under the Apache 2.0 license.

item.title: Large Enough
item.description: Today, we are announcing Mistral Large 2, the new generation of our flagship model. Compared to its predecessor, Mistral Large 2 is significantly more capable in code generation, mathematics, and reasoning. It also provides a much stronger multilingual support, and advanced function calling capabilities.

item.title: Build, tweak, repeat
item.description: Making it easier to develop and share generative AI applications.

item.title: Announcing Pixtral 12B
item.description: Pixtral 12B - the first-ever multimodal Mistral model. Apache 2.0.

item.title: AI in abundance
item.description: Introducing a free API, improved pricing across the board, a new enterprise-grade Mistral Small, and free vision capabilities on le Chat.

item.title: Un Ministral, des Ministraux
item.description: Introducing the world’s best edge models.

item.title: Mistral Moderation API
item.description: We are introducing our new moderation service enabling our users to detect undesirable text content along several policy dimensions.

item.title: Mistral Batch API
item.description: Lower cost API for AI builders.

item.title: Pixtral Large
item.description: Pixtral grows up.

item.title: Mistral has entered the chat
item.description: Search, vision, ideation, coding… all yours for free.

item.title: Codestral 25.01
item.description: Access the Codestral 25.01 API

item.title: Purr-fectly informed
item.description: Le Chat and AFP team up to deliver AI powered by news, providing Le Chat users with richer, more reliable and more accurate responses.

item.title: Mistral Small 3
item.description: Mistral Small 3: Apache 2.0, 81% MMLU, 150 tokens/s

item.title: The all new le Chat: Your AI assistant for life and work
item.description: Brand new features, iOS and Android apps, Pro, Team, and Enterprise tiers.

item.title: Mistral Saba
item.description: One of the many custom-trained models to serve specific geographies, markets, and customers

item.title: Empowering product development with an agentic workflow
item.description: Transform meeting transcripts into development tasks with Mistral AI: From call transcript to PRD to engineering tickets.

item.title: Mistral OCR
item.description: Introducing the world’s best document understanding API.

item.title: Mistral Small 3.1
item.description: SOTA. Multimodal. Multilingual. Apache 2.0

item.title: Evaluating RAG with LLM as a Judge
item.description: Using Mistral Models for LLM as a Judge (With Structured Outputs)

item.title: Introducing Le Chat Enterprise
item.description: Your Enterprise. Your AI.

item.title: Medium is the new large.
item.description: Mistral Medium 3 delivers state-of-the-art performance at 8X lower cost with radically simplified enterprise deployments.

item.title: Devstral
item.description: Introducing the best open-source model for coding agents.

item.title: Build AI agents with the Mistral Agents API
Codestral Embed
item.description: The new state-of-the-art embedding model for code.

item.title: Magistral
item.description: Stands to reason.

item.title: Mistral Compute
item.description: Frontier AI infrastructure for everyone.

item.title: Announcing AI for Citizens
item.description: Empowering countries to use AI to transform public action and catalyze innovation for the benefit of their citizens.

item.title: Upgrading agentic coding capabilities with the new Devstral models
Voxtral
item.description: Introducing frontier open source speech understanding models.

item.title: Le Chat dives deep.
item.description: Introducing Deep Research (Preview), plus Audio-in, Projects, and other updates.

item.title: Our contribution to a global environmental standard for AI
Announcing Codestral 25.08 and the Complete Mistral Coding Stack for Enterprise
Unlocking the potential of vision language models on satellite imagery through fine-tuning
Le Chat. Custom MCP connectors. Memories.
item.description: Le Chat now integrates with 20+ enterprise platforms—powered by MCP—and remembers what matters with Memories.

item.title: Make Memory work for you.
item.description: Designing transparency and control into AI recall.

item.title: Mistral AI raises 1.7B€ to accelerate technological progress with AI
Introducing Mistral AI Studio.
item.description: The Production AI Platform.

item.title: Introducing Mistral 3
item.description: A family of frontier open-source multimodal models

item.title: Introducing: Devstral 2 and Mistral Vibe CLI.
item.description: State-of-the-art, open-source agentic coding models and CLI agent.

item.title: Introducing Mistral OCR 3
item.description: Achieving a new frontier for both accuracy and efficiency in document processing.

item.title: Heaps do lie: debugging a memory leak in vLLM.
Voxtral transcribes at the speed of sound.
item.description: Precision diarization, real-time transcription, and a new audio playground.

item.title: Rails testing on autopilot: Building an agent that writes what developers won't
Leanstral: Open-Source foundation for trustworthy vibe-coding
item.description: First open-source code agent for Lean 4.

item.title: Mistral AI partners with NVIDIA to accelerate open frontier models
item.description: As a founding member of the NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition, Mistral AI is contributing large-scale model development and multimodal capabilities.

item.title: Introducing Forge
item.description: Today, we’re introducing Forge, a system that allows enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge.

item.title: Speaking of Voxtral
item.description: Voxtral TTS: A frontier, open-weights text-to-speech model that’s fast, instantly adaptable, and produces lifelike speech for voice agents.

item.title: Spaces: A CLI Built for Humans and Agents
item.description: Designing for agents forced us to build better tools for everyone.
